popularStory.description: Mary Allerton Cushman was a Dutch settler of Plymouth Colony in what is now Massachusetts. She was the last surviving passenger of the Mayflower. She arrived at Plymouth on the Mayflower when she was …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Norris於1588年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾史盧比時，她的父親Edward Norris36歲，母親Elinor Pilaster35歲。她於1611年11月4日與Isaac Allerton在荷蘭霍蘭萊登結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1621年2月25日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯享年33歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯科爾斯 希爾 布利亞爾 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Norris于1588年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾史盧比时，她的父亲Edward Norris36岁，母亲Elinor Pilaster35岁。她于1611年11月4日与Isaac Allerton在荷兰霍蘭萊登结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1621年2月25日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯享年33岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯科爾斯 希爾 布利亞爾 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Norris
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Middle English norreis, noreis, norais ‘northerner’ (Anglo-Norman French noreis), used both of Norwegians and of inhabitants of northern England and Scotland.
from the Middle English personal name Norreis, derived from norreis ‘northerner’.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.description: In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Norris was born in 1588, in Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Edward Norris, was 36 and her mother, Elinor Pilaster, was 35. She married Isaac Allerton on 4 November 1611, in Leiden, Holland, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 25 February 1621, in Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 33, and was buried in Coles Hill Burial Ground, Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Norris est née en 1588, à Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Edward Norris, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Elinor Pilaster, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Isaac Allerton le 4 novembre 1611, à Leiden, Holland, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 février 1621, à Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterrée à Coles Hill Burial Ground, Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Norris 1588 in Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edward Norris 36 und ihre Mutter Elinor Pilaster 35. Sie hat am 4. November 1611 in Leiden, Holland, Niederlande Isaac Allerton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. Februar 1621 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Coles Hill Burial Ground, Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Norris è nata il nel 1588 nel Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, England, sua padre, Edward Norris, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Elinor Pilaster, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Isaac Allerton il 4 novembre 1611, nel Leiden, Holland, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 25 febbraio 1621, nel Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolta a Coles Hill Burial Ground, Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Norris(이)가 1588년 영국 노틴그함실르 스크루비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward Norris(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elinor Pilaster(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1611년 11월 4일 네덜란드 홀랜드 레이든에서 Isaac Allerton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1621년 2월 25일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 플림우스에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 플림우스 콜레스 힐 버이앨 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Norris nasceu em 1588, em Scrooby, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edward Norris, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Elinor Pilaster, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Isaac Allerton em 4 de novembro de 1611, em Leiden, Holland, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de fevereiro de 1621, em Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, com 33 anos, e foi sepultada em Coles Hill Burial Ground, Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Norris родилась в 1588 г. в местности скруби, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Edward Norris было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Elinor Pilaster, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Isaac Allerton 4 ноября 1611 г. в местности лиден, холланд, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 25 февраля 1621 г. в местности плимоут, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 33 лет и была похоронена в местности колесь хилл буряль гроунд, плимоут, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

Se casó con Isaac Allerton el 4 de noviembre de 1611, en Leiden, Holland, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 25 de febrero de 1621, en Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultada en Coles Hill Burial Ground, Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.
